Cnf_tokenMsg1: Please keep this token safe and use it carefully to keep you account safe. If HAWKI detects suspicious behaviour this token will be revoked.
Cnf_tokenMsg2: Once you close this window you will not be able to get this key again.
Cnf_tokenRevoke: Are you sure you want to revoke token
Cnf_passkeyRemove:
By confirming this, your Datakey and keychain data will be removed from this browser. Please remember that we currently don't provide any Datakey recovery solutions.
Please make sure that you have a secure backup of your Datakey before proceeding.
AboutHAWKI_Info: The offering was developed in the Interaction Design Lab at HAWK to give all university members the opportunity to integrate artificial intelligence into work processes and to have a space for exchange, potentially resulting in new working methods and fostering an internal university discussion on the use of AI. This offering also aims to provide didactic support, to develop an understanding of the functioning of a language model, and therefore gives indications of well-operating prompts (text inputs) in different areas. We welcome constructive feedback to further develop this offering in line with your needs and insights.
AboutHAWKI_VincentInfo: | Research Associate | Head of Interaction Design Lab
ClearLocalData: Remove local data and sign out
HS_LostBothT: Did you lose both your Datakey and Recovery Code?
HS_LostBothB: Unfortuately if you've lost both your Datakey and Recovery Code, we can't recover your profile data. To continue we need to reset your profile and give you a new access. This will remove all your previous data including all your chats and rooms. Do you want to continue?

MistakeWarning: AI may make mistakes. Check important information.
Reg_SL1_T: Your chats will be saved, so you can access them later at any time, across devices. Your entries are stored by XFEL and are completely secure: everything you write is encrypted. This means that no one can see what you have written. However according to OpenAI policies your entries are stored by them for 30 days.
Reg_SL2_T: The chat data is encrypted with your personal key. This key will be requested each time you use a new device, new browser, etc. If you lose your key and your recovery code, there is no way to decrypt your chat history. In this case you will have to delete you RAY account and start from scratch.
Reg_SL4_T: Important: On your first login, you create your personal Datakey, a type of password. Your chats are encrypted with this Datakey before being stored on our server. In addition to the login, you will need your Datakey when you log in on a new device. Your device or browser remembers your Datakey, so you don't have to enter it every time. In the final step, you can also download the recovery code for your Datakey.
Reg_SL5_T: Please note: Your chat messages are securely encrypted. If you lose your Datakey, you will no longer be able to access your previous chats. Therefore, keep your Datakey safe and protect it from third-party access.
Reg_SL6_T: With this recovery code, you can restore your Datakey if you forget or lose it. Download your code onto your device and store it in a secure location, such as on a USB stick or in a protected environment.
StartBanner: What shall we start with today? 👏
PH_SearchBar: Enter Name, Username oder E-Mail Address
Api_Warning: To be able to use the HAWKI language models in other applications, you can generate your own API key. To do this, send an email to your IT department, who will generate the API key for you and send it to you.
